title: American Casserole
description: A classic American casserole made with buttery goodness and dense ingredients. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Cut the dense bread into 1-inch cubes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cubed bread and American cheese.
Melt the butter and pour it over the bread mixture. Stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to the casserole dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
